key_themes: Record revenue, profits, and high profit margins in gold production
Low-cost operations with strong cash position
Advancing exploration pipeline and multi-asset growth in West Africa
Strong Buy analyst ratings with ~45-55% implied upside
summary: Thor Explorations Ltd. (TSXV: THX, AIM: THX), a West African gold producer, is generating strongly positive financial sentiment after reporting record 2025 revenue/profits, robust Q1 2026 operating results, exceptionally high margins (one of the top among gold miners), and maintained guidance.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/THX.V/)[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/THX.V/)[[2]](https://www.tipranks.com/stocks/tse:thx) Investors and brokers highlight its low-cost Segilola mine, substantial net cash, ongoing dividends (yielding ~3.4%), and progress at the Douta project plus other exploration targets, positioning the company for multi-mine growth amid elevated gold prices. Analysts maintain Strong Buy ratings with average 12-month targets around C$2.21–2.31 (roughly 45–55% upside from ~C$1.50).[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/THX.V/)[[3]](https://www.alphaspread.com/security/xtsx/thx/analyst-estimates)
sources: 10+ recent news articles (Yahoo Finance, Proactive, Tipranks, Reuters, etc.), 15+ relevant X posts and investor discussions (April 2026), Earnings releases, investor webinars, broker notes, and LSE share chat
